title: create_room_with_valid_and_invalid_participant_limits
description: Test creating a room with valid participant limits (1-50) and invalid limits (e.g., 100) to verify validation and error handling.

title: join_room_with_valid_and_invalid_codes
description: Test joining a room with existing 6-digit codes and non-existent codes to verify successful join and 404 error response.

title: create_edit_publish_and_delete_entries
description: Test creating draft entries in mad/sad/glad categories, editing drafts, publishing entries, and deleting entries with ownership and content length validations.

title: start_extend_reopen_and_terminate_timer_as_creator_and_non_creator
description: Test timer lifecycle endpoints for starting, extending, reopening, and terminating the retro by creator and non-creator roles, including validation of time extension limits.

title: rate_published_entries_after_retro_end_with_validations
description: Test rating published entries after retro ends with valid ratings (1-5), invalid ratings, self-rating prevention, and rating disallowed before retro ends.

title: export_selected_published_entries_to_excel_as_creator_and_non_creator
description: Test exporting selected and published entries to Excel by creator and non-creator roles, including handling of no entries to export.

title: socket_io_join_room_and_receive_real_time_updates
description: Test Socket.IO connection with joinRoom event for valid and invalid room codes, receiving roomState, newEntry, participantUpdate, and entryToggled events.

title: toggle_entry_selection_by_creator_and_non_creator
description: Test toggling entry selection by creator and non-creator roles, verifying permission enforcement and broadcast of entryToggled event.

title: get_participants_list_and_room_cleanup_after_all_leave
description: Test retrieving participants list via API and verify room auto-deletion after all participants leave, ensuring subsequent room access returns 404.

title: client_language_detection_and_persistence
description: Test client-side language detection from browser, loading supported language packs, and persistence of language choice in localStorage across sessions.
